post.summary: Cancel or Refund a Payment with transaction

parameters.name: payment_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the payment (UUID, 36 chars).

parameters.name: transaction_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the transaction (UUID, 36 chars).

description.description: Description of the cancellation or refund. (MAX 255; MIN 3).

reason.description: Indicating the reason for the cancellation or refund. If set, possible values are `DUPLICATE`, `FRAUDULENT`, `REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER`, and `REVERSE`. Use `REVERSE` to request an automatic reverse of the recipient funds when a recipient is involved in the transaction.

merchant_reference.description: Identification of the payment transaction defined by the merchant. If no merchant_reference is defined, the merchant_order_id of the payment will be associated to the transaction. (MAX 255; MIN 3).

amount.description: Specifies the amount object for refund.

currency.description: The currency used to make the payment. For a full list of currency codes, see [Country reference](https://docs.y.uno/docs/country-reference) (MAX 3; MIN 3; ISO 4217).

recipient_id.description:
The unique identifier of the recipient in the Yuno system.
You must provide the [`recipient_id`](https://docs.y.uno/reference/create-recipient-1) (Yuno-generated) or the `provider_recipient_id` (external provider's ID) when creating a payment.

provider_recipient_id.description:
The recipient ID provided by the external payment provider, if applicable.
You must provide the `provider_recipient_id` or the [`recipient_id`](https://docs.y.uno/reference/create-recipients) (Yuno-generated) when creating a payment.

type.description: The type of split. `recipient_id` is mandatory for `PURCHASE` and `MARKETPLACE`.

merchant_reference.description: Optional unique identifier for the split transaction (MAX 255; MIN 3).

recipient_type.description: The type of recipient for the provider.

amount.description: Defines the amount of the split.

currency.description: The currency used to make the payment. For a full list of currency codes, see [Country reference](https://docs.y.uno/docs/country-reference) (MAX 3; MIN 3; ISO 4217).

liability.description: Optional information regarding the recipient's liability for fees and chargebacks.

processing_fee.description: Indicates who will be charged the transaction fee.

chargebacks.description: The recipient is responsible in case of a chargeback.

simplified_mode.description: Indicates if we should try to refund a payment after an error/declined on the first try. It is `false` by default. For more information, access the [guide](transaction-retries).

response_additional_data.description: Specifies additional data for required the transaction response

receipt.description: Indicates if a receipt is necessary for the transaction response

receipt_language.description: Indicates the language of the receipt to be generated

gender.description:
The customer's gender (MAX 2; MIN 1).
- M=Male
- F=Female
- NB=Non Binary
- NA=Not applicable
- NK=Not Known
- U=Undefined.

date_of_birth.description: The customer's date of birth in the `YYYY-MM-DD` format (Length: 10).

document.description: Specifies the customer's document object, including its number and type.

document_type.description: The customer's document type (MAX 6, MIN 2). Access [Document Type List](https://docs.y.uno/reference/country-reference) for more details.

country_code.description: The country code of the customer's phone (MAX 3; MIN 1).

number.description: The customer's phone number, without the country code (MAX 32; MIN 1).

billing_address.description: Specifies the customer's billing address object.

address_line_1.description: The primary billing address line of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

address_line_2.description: The secondary billing address line of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

city.description: The city considered for the billing address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

country.description: The country considered for the billing address (MAX 2; MIN 2; [ISO 3166-1](https://docs.y.uno/reference/customer-object#country-code-list-iso-3166-1)).

state.description: The state considered for the billing address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

zip_code.description: The zipcode considered for the billing address (MAX 10; MIN 5).

shipping_address.description: Specifies the customer's shipping address object.

address_line_1.description: The primary shipping address line of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

address_line_2.description: The secondary shipping address line of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

city.description: The city considered for the shipping address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

country.description: The country considered for the shipping address (MAX 2; MIN 2; [ISO 3166-1](https://docs.y.uno/reference/customer-object#country-code-list-iso-3166-1)).

state.description: The state considered for the shipping address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

zip_code.description: The zipcode considered for the shipping address (MAX 10; MIN 5).

payment_method.description: Specifies payment method object for payments.

detail.description: Specifies the payment method detail object.

bank_transfer.description: Specifies bank transfer payment method details.

beneficiary_name.description: Name of the account holder (MAX 255; MIN 3)

beneficiary_document_type.description: Document type of the account holder (MAX 255; MIN 3)

beneficiary_document.description: Document number of the account holder (MAX 255; MIN 3)

reference.description: Reference code for the user (MAX 255; MIN 1)

messages: The merchant has no authorization to use this API.

items.example: The merchant has no authorization to use this API.
